Add Watermark

Effortlessly apply an image or text overlay onto your PDF. Customize typography, transparency, and placement.

Select pdf files

or drop files here

Watermark options

Watermark Type

Text Format

Arial
36
50%
0°

The PDF has been stamped successfully!

How to Add Watermark to PDF?

Steps to add a watermark to your PDF file.

  1. Step 1

    Open the Add Watermark tool on PDFEquips.

  2. Step 2

    Select your PDF file.

  3. Step 3

    Choose and customize your watermark (text or image).

  4. Step 4

    Click the 'Add Watermark' button to apply the watermark.

  5. Step 5

    Click the 'Download Watermarked PDF' button to save your file.

Easy Customization

Effortlessly customize the typography, transparency, and placement of your watermark.

Text and Image Watermarks

Apply both text and image watermarks to your PDF documents.

Secure and Fast

Our tool is secure and fast, ensuring your PDFs are processed quickly and kept private.

PDFEquips © 2026 ® - Add Watermark to PDF Online - Customizable PDF Watermark Tool
